sql: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, o.id, o.order_no, o.amount, o.status as order_status, o.created_at as order_date FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.status = #{userStatus} AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND o.status = #{orderStatus} ORDER BY #{sortField} LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT
    <include refid="RWW_Cols_User"/>,
    <include refid="RWW_Cols_Order"/>
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
<where>
    <include refid="RWW_Filter_All"/>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
